#  Manufacturing 
  * [ Capabilities ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/industries/manufacturing#anc01)
  * [ Insights ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/industries/manufacturing#anc02)
  * [ Customer stories ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/industries/manufacturing#anc03)
  * [ Related Categories ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/industries/manufacturing#anc04)


In today's challenging landscape of supply chain disruptions, labor shortages, and increasing regulatory complexity, manufacturers must be adaptable, agile, insight-driven, and sustainable. Fujitsu empowers manufacturers to thrive by transforming data into actionable insights, optimizing operations, and driving efficiency, agility, and innovation across the entire factory ecosystem.
## Capabilities
[ Smart Factory](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/industries/manufacturing/smart-factory)
Digital Factory Transformation: Drive sustainability, agility, and resilience by integrating data, automation, and intelligence across your entire factory ecosystem.
**Product Development QCDE Optimization**
Gain a competitive edge in manufacturing by optimizing Quality, Cost, Delivery, and Environmental impact (QCDE) for faster, more efficient, and sustainable results.
[ Supply Chain Management](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/industries/manufacturing/supply-chain-management)
Discover Fujitsu’s Supply Chain Management solutions to optimize operations, improve resilience, and drive sustainable business growth.
**Workforce Transformation**
Attract, train, and retain top talent by equipping your workforce with the skills and technologies needed for a sustainable future. Engage employees in a safer working environment.
## Insights
**Fujitsu: Accelerating your digital manufacturing vision**
Fujitsu guides manufacturers through digital transformation, leveraging its 90 years of experience operating its own factories. Our solutions address key challenges in factory efficiency, workforce transformation, supply chain resilience, quality assurance, innovation, and sustainability. We offer a phased approach combining consultancy, implementation, and real-world experience to help manufacturers achieve production efficiency, agility and sustainability, unlocking the full potential of digital manufacturing.
[ Read the IDC Info Brief: Data & AI - The Essentials for Building Robust Manufacturing Operations ](https://mkt-europe.global.fujitsu.com/idc-info-brief-data-AI-Manufacturing?utm_campaign=idc-info-brief-ai-Manufacturing-nov25&utm_source=manufacturing-sitecore-page&utm_medium=cta&utm_content=form#form)
![Three engineers viewing an augmented reality jet engine simulation in a conference room](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/industries/manufacturing/kv-manufacturing-insights-936x578.jpg?h=578&iar=0&w=936&rev=da4ff0185b81488ba06c146fb0b3b277&hash=62DA38CCAE0F8093D02D9C1E39F03851)
[ Dissolve manufacturing silos with Digital Transformation](https://corporate-blog.global.fujitsu.com/fgb/2024-12-04/01/)
![Bottled water production line](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/redirects/corporate-blog/corporate-blog_global_fujitsu_com_fgb_2024-12-04_01-936x578.jpg?rev=514e7b2ec302472c91cbf01333f7766c&hash=F91993502EDA3873014B05E4DCE942AE)
[ Boosting operational resilience and sustainability with Proactive Factory Management](https://corporate-blog.global.fujitsu.com/fgb/2024-11-27/01/)
![Female worker taking notes in a factory](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/redirects/corporate-blog/corporate-blog_global_fujitsu_com_fgb_2024-11-27_01-936x578.jpg?rev=f6a6ab2cbeb64321bf0ec8a9f238f0c4&hash=0D6AA5AFC4836D8CBA58D49F036E90FB)
[ Why OT digitalization matters: a guide to unlocking the power of data in manufacturing](https://corporate-blog.global.fujitsu.com/fgb/2024-07-23/01/)
![Male and female workers looking at a laptop in a factory](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/redirects/corporate-blog/corporate-blog_global_fujitsu_com_fgb_2024-07-23_01-936x578.jpg?rev=7d2895b9ab2b4e299d775f717b555aeb&hash=1678B2DD9C40477F3BBC7C78DECBE529)
## Customer stories
![A woman looking to the side with a city full of lights as her background](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/industries/manufacturing/cs-hmd-global-20240305-809x500.jpg?h=500&iar=0&w=809&rev=72b890d1818147b5bd4b888d21fed148&hash=3940D91DB8B1B261DF3B832D2F112E7B)
HMD Global - Orchestrating the right outcomes 
HMD Global, Europe’s largest manufacturer of mobile phones, leveraged the power of RISE with SAP on Microsoft Azure to become an intelligent and sustainable enterprise. Fujitsu provided the expertise to reimagine business processes and transform mission-critical systems for future success.
[ Read the HMD Global story ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories/cs-hmd-global-20240305)
[ Bayer Crop Science](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories/cs-bayer-crop-science-20220805)
The quantum inspired Digital Annealer has the potential to transform how Bayer plans its campaigns, enabling a more complete model of Bayer production processes with all the variables to solve problems in seconds.
![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/customer-stories/cs-bayer-crop-science-20220805/cs-bayer-crop-science-20220805-809x500.jpg?rev=4c4c4a50e6f447c68922cd4fc599a43f&hash=8617B2FF8454D32EE2FAE0205221F9A3)
[ Doi Kham Food Products Co., Ltd.](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories/cs-doi-kham-20241120)
Doi Kham Food Products Co., Ltd. is a model of social business, operating under the King’s philosophy, developing and creating products from communities with world-class quality and for the overall well-being of society.
![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/customer-stories/cs-doi-kham-20241120/cs-doi-kham-20241120-809x500.jpg?rev=0a0ac99cceec4b41b3867bbb8b685030&hash=F00AEB807CECA187385809FBFDCAA48E)
[ Industrial Automation Manufacturer](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories/cs-industrial-automation-manufacturer-20250123)
Intelligent Application Managed Services focus on continuous improvement through process automation, performance data analysis, proactive fault detection, and application-level monitoring.
![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/customer-stories/cs-industrial-automation-manufacturer-20250123/cs-industrial-automation-manufacturer-20250123-809x500.png?rev=89e48ec337af49caa73c4ebdd1677da0&hash=5FF547F33911BC3D1E50F727DE90EFF7)
[ Manufacturing customer stories ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories?tags=Manufacturing)
